tasks.label: git-commit-monitoring-pointer-fix
tasks.command: git add src/app/[locale]/user/searches/[id]/page.tsx && git commit -m "fix: add pointer cursor to mobile visit link on monitoring results"

tasks.label: git-check-and-push-personal
args: $branch = git branch --show-current; $status = git status -sb; Write-Output $status; if ($status -match '\[ahead (\d+)\]') { git push personal $branch } else { Write-Output 'Nothing to push (not ahead of tracked branch).' }

tasks.label: check-git-sync
tasks.command: git status --short && echo --- && git branch --show-current && echo --- && git log --oneline -3 && echo --- && git remote -v && echo --- && git branch -vv && echo --- && git log personal..HEAD --oneline

tasks.label: check-git-sync-now
tasks.command: git status --short && echo --- && git branch --show-current && echo --- && git log --oneline -3 && echo --- && git remote -v && echo --- && git branch -vv && echo --- && git log personal..HEAD --oneline
